name: semanticsearch
description: SIMD cosine-similarity nearest-neighbour search over content embeddings. Vectors are L2-normalized by the host, so cosine == dot product; the kernel does a 4-wide f32x4 dot-product sweep.

alloc.doc: reserve byteLen bytes (8-byte aligned), growing linear memory; returns byte ptr

cosine.doc: OUT f32[count]: cosine similarity (dot of unit vectors) of query vs each doc

cosineTopK.doc: fused single-pass top-k; OUT {i32 index; f32 score}[k] best-first; returns count written (<=k)

memory.name: topk
memory.note: cosineTopK() output: {i32 index; f32 score} per 8-byte slot

notes: Query embedding must come from the same model as the document embeddings. Typical use is 'find similar to this document' (query = an existing doc vector). Embeddings are precomputed and shipped as a static JSON asset; no model runs client-side.
